summary: Iteration 20: Testing 5 NEW features - Admin SEO Manager, Referral Discount System, Enhanced User Dashboard, Checkout with Referral Support, Dynamic SEO Meta Tags. All backend tests passed (19/19). Frontend tests passed for SEO admin page, referral code application toast, and login flow.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/seo/global returns default SEO settings (site_title, site_description, default_keywords)
Backend: PUT /api/seo/global requires admin auth (returns 401 without auth)
Backend: PUT /api/seo/global successfully updates settings with admin auth
Backend: GET /api/seo/pages/{slug} returns page-specific SEO defaults
Backend: GET /api/seo/pages returns list of all page SEO settings
Backend: PUT /api/seo/pages/{slug} saves page SEO settings with admin auth
Backend: GET /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML sitemap with proper structure
Backend: GET /api/robots.txt returns proper robots.txt content (User-agent, Allow, Disallow, Sitemap)
Backend: GET /api/referral/config returns enabled=true, discount_percent=20, referrer_reward_percent=10
Backend: POST /api/referral/generate creates unique DIO-XXXXXX referral code for email
Backend: POST /api/referral/generate returns same code for same email (idempotent)
Backend: GET /api/referral/validate/{code} returns valid=true with discount_percent=20
Backend: GET /api/referral/validate/INVALIDCODE returns 404
Backend: POST /api/referral/apply applies 20% discount and calculates correct discounted_amount
Backend: POST /api/referral/apply rejects using own referral code (400 error)
Backend: POST /api/resume/checkout with referral_code applies discount (19.99 -> 15.99)
Backend: GET /api/user/dashboard requires public user auth (401 without)
Backend: GET /api/referral/stats requires admin auth
Backend: GET /api/referral/stats returns total_codes, total_uses, total_discount_given, top_referrers
Frontend: /admin/seo page loads with 'SEO Manager' heading (data-testid='seo-heading')
Frontend: Global SEO tab shows site title, description, keywords with add/remove
Frontend: Pages tab shows 9 site pages with per-page title, description, keywords, OG settings
Frontend: Advanced tab shows Schema.org settings, robots.txt custom rules, custom head tags
Frontend: /dashboard redirects to /login when not authenticated
Frontend: Resume optimizer with ?ref=CODE shows 'Referral code applied! 20% off your purchase.' toast
Frontend: SEO meta tags injected in document head (title, description, keywords, og:title)
critical_code_review_comments: SEO routes (seo.py): Proper MongoDB exclude of _id with {'_id': 0} projections
Referral routes (referral.py): Secure code generation using secrets.token_hex, proper idempotency check
User dashboard (user_dashboard.py): Correctly joins resume_uploads, analyses, improvements, payments for history
Resume checkout (resume.py lines 391-429): Properly applies referral discount before Stripe checkout
Layout.jsx SEO injection: Uses useEffect per route to dynamically set meta tags, og:tags, schema.org JSON-LD
AdminSeo.jsx: Fixed useState-in-map bug by extracting PageSeoCard as separate component
UserDashboardPage.jsx: Has 4 tabs (resumes, payments, cover-letters, referral) with proper data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all SEO and referral UI features verified)

seed_data_creation: Generated test referral codes with TEST_ prefix emails for validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 NEW features fully tested and working: (1) Admin SEO Manager at /admin/seo with Global/Pages/Advanced tabs - all data-testid attributes present. (2) Referral system generates DIO-XXXXXX codes, validates codes with 20% discount, applies to checkout, prevents self-use. (3) User dashboard at /dashboard requires Google auth, shows resume history/payments/letters/referral tabs. (4) Resume checkout accepts referral_code param and applies discount before Stripe. (5) Layout.jsx dynamically injects SEO meta tags per route. robots.txt and sitemap.xml endpoints work correctly.

admin_seo_manager.global_tab: Site title, description, keywords, OG image, Google/Bing verification
admin_seo_manager.pages_tab: 9 pages with individual SEO settings (title, desc, keywords, og settings, canonical)
admin_seo_manager.advanced_tab: Schema.org JSON-LD, robots.txt custom rules, custom head tags

referral_system.ui_integration: ?ref=CODE in URL shows discount toast on resume optimizer page

seo_injection.sitemap_xml: /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with dynamic content

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/seo/pages: 200 OK - returns list of page SEO settings

screenshots: .screenshots/iteration20_admin_seo_pages.png - Admin SEO Pages tab with 9 page cards
.screenshots/iteration20_user_login.png - User login page with Google auth
